#### [Hexalith\.EventStore\.Aspire](index.md 'index')
### [Hexalith\.EventStore\.Aspire](Hexalith.EventStore.Aspire.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Aspire')

## HexalithEventStorePlatformExtensions Class

Provides the Aspire hosting extension that adds the Hexalith\.EventStore platform projects \(command gateway,
Admin\.Server\.Host and Admin\.UI\) to a domain\-module AppHost\.

```csharp
public static class HexalithEventStorePlatformExtensions
```

Inheritance [System\.Object](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.object 'System\.Object') → HexalithEventStorePlatformExtensions

### Remarks

Every Hexalith domain module (Tenants, FrontComposer, …) hosts its services on the shared EventStore
platform and therefore needs to add the same three EventStore projects to its AppHost. Previously each
AppHost hand-rolled identical [Aspire\.Hosting\.IProjectMetadata](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/aspire.hosting.iprojectmetadata 'Aspire\.Hosting\.IProjectMetadata') classes plus a repository-path helper to do
this. That boilerplate now lives here, in the EventStore platform Aspire library, so domain modules call a
single helper instead of duplicating it.

The projects are referenced cross-repo from the consuming repository's `Hexalith.EventStore` submodule
with [Aspire\.Hosting\.IProjectMetadata\.SuppressBuild](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/aspire.hosting.iprojectmetadata.suppressbuild 'Aspire\.Hosting\.IProjectMetadata\.SuppressBuild') set to [true](https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/csharp/language-reference/builtin-types/bool 'https://docs\.microsoft\.com/en\-us/dotnet/csharp/language\-reference/builtin\-types/bool'); the EventStore platform is
built independently (Aspire runs children with `--no-build`). This helper only <i>adds</i> the
projects — the consumer wires the DAPR topology by passing the returned resources to
[AddHexalithEventStore\(this IDistributedApplicationBuilder, IResourceBuilder&lt;ProjectResource&gt;, IResourceBuilder&lt;ProjectResource&gt;, IResourceBuilder&lt;ProjectResource&gt;, string, string, string, int, string, string, string\)](Hexalith.EventStore.Aspire.HexalithEventStoreExtensions.md#Hexalith.EventStore.Aspire.HexalithEventStoreExtensions.AddHexalithEventStore(thisAspire.Hosting.IDistributedApplicationBuilder,Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder_Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.ProjectResource_,Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder_Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.ProjectResource_,Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder_Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.ProjectResource_,string,string,string,int,string,string,string) 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Aspire\.HexalithEventStoreExtensions\.AddHexalithEventStore\(this Aspire\.Hosting\.IDistributedApplicationBuilder, Aspire\.Hosting\.ApplicationModel\.IResourceBuilder\<Aspire\.Hosting\.ApplicationModel\.ProjectResource\>, Aspire\.Hosting\.ApplicationModel\.IResourceBuilder\<Aspire\.Hosting\.ApplicationModel\.ProjectResource\>, Aspire\.Hosting\.ApplicationModel\.IResourceBuilder\<Aspire\.Hosting\.ApplicationModel\.ProjectResource\>, string, string, string, int, string, string, string\)').
### Methods

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Aspire.HexalithEventStorePlatformExtensions.AddHexalithEventStoreGatewayProject(thisAspire.Hosting.IDistributedApplicationBuilder,string)'></a>

## HexalithEventStorePlatformExtensions\.AddHexalithEventStoreGatewayProject\(this IDistributedApplicationBuilder, string\) Method

Adds \<b\>only\</b\> the Hexalith\.EventStore command\-gateway project \(no Admin\.Server / Admin\.UI\) to the
distributed application, resolving the project file cross\-repo from the consuming repository's
`Hexalith.EventStore` submodule\.

```csharp
public static Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder<Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.ProjectResource> AddHexalithEventStoreGatewayProject(this Aspire.Hosting.IDistributedApplicationBuilder builder, string eventStoreName="eventstore");
```
#### Parameters

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Aspire.HexalithEventStorePlatformExtensions.AddHexalithEventStoreGatewayProject(thisAspire.Hosting.IDistributedApplicationBuilder,string).builder'></a>

`builder` [Aspire\.Hosting\.IDistributedApplicationBuilder](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/aspire.hosting.idistributedapplicationbuilder 'Aspire\.Hosting\.IDistributedApplicationBuilder')

The distributed application builder\.

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Aspire.HexalithEventStorePlatformExtensions.AddHexalithEventStoreGatewayProject(thisAspire.Hosting.IDistributedApplicationBuilder,string).eventStoreName'></a>

`eventStoreName` [System\.String](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.string 'System\.String')

The Aspire resource name for the EventStore command gateway\. Defaults to `"eventstore"`\.

#### Returns
[Aspire\.Hosting\.ApplicationModel\.IResourceBuilder&lt;](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/aspire.hosting.applicationmodel.iresourcebuilder-1 'Aspire\.Hosting\.ApplicationModel\.IResourceBuilder\`1')[Aspire\.Hosting\.ApplicationModel\.ProjectResource](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/aspire.hosting.applicationmodel.projectresource 'Aspire\.Hosting\.ApplicationModel\.ProjectResource')[&gt;](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/aspire.hosting.applicationmodel.iresourcebuilder-1 'Aspire\.Hosting\.ApplicationModel\.IResourceBuilder\`1')
The EventStore command\-gateway project resource builder for further customization and topology wiring\.

#### Exceptions

[System\.ArgumentNullException](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.argumentnullexception 'System\.ArgumentNullException')
Thrown when [builder](Hexalith.EventStore.Aspire.HexalithEventStorePlatformExtensions.md#Hexalith.EventStore.Aspire.HexalithEventStorePlatformExtensions.AddHexalithEventStoreGatewayProject(thisAspire.Hosting.IDistributedApplicationBuilder,string).builder 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Aspire\.HexalithEventStorePlatformExtensions\.AddHexalithEventStoreGatewayProject\(this Aspire\.Hosting\.IDistributedApplicationBuilder, string\)\.builder') is [null](https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/csharp/language-reference/keywords/null 'https://docs\.microsoft\.com/en\-us/dotnet/csharp/language\-reference/keywords/null')\.

[System\.ArgumentException](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.argumentexception 'System\.ArgumentException')
Thrown when [eventStoreName](Hexalith.EventStore.Aspire.HexalithEventStorePlatformExtensions.md#Hexalith.EventStore.Aspire.HexalithEventStorePlatformExtensions.AddHexalithEventStoreGatewayProject(thisAspire.Hosting.IDistributedApplicationBuilder,string).eventStoreName 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Aspire\.HexalithEventStorePlatformExtensions\.AddHexalithEventStoreGatewayProject\(this Aspire\.Hosting\.IDistributedApplicationBuilder, string\)\.eventStoreName') is [null](https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/csharp/language-reference/keywords/null 'https://docs\.microsoft\.com/en\-us/dotnet/csharp/language\-reference/keywords/null') or whitespace\.

### Remarks
Use this for a \<i\>gateway\-only\</i\> composition: a domain\-module AppHost that hosts the EventStore command
gateway without the admin surface\. Pass the returned builder as the `eventStore` argument to
[AddHexalithEventStore\(this IDistributedApplicationBuilder, IResourceBuilder&lt;ProjectResource&gt;, IResourceBuilder&lt;ProjectResource&gt;, IResourceBuilder&lt;ProjectResource&gt;, string, string, string, int, string, string, string\)](Hexalith.EventStore.Aspire.HexalithEventStoreExtensions.md#Hexalith.EventStore.Aspire.HexalithEventStoreExtensions.AddHexalithEventStore(thisAspire.Hosting.IDistributedApplicationBuilder,Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder_Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.ProjectResource_,Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder_Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.ProjectResource_,Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder_Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.ProjectResource_,string,string,string,int,string,string,string) 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Aspire\.HexalithEventStoreExtensions\.AddHexalithEventStore\(this Aspire\.Hosting\.IDistributedApplicationBuilder, Aspire\.Hosting\.ApplicationModel\.IResourceBuilder\<Aspire\.Hosting\.ApplicationModel\.ProjectResource\>, Aspire\.Hosting\.ApplicationModel\.IResourceBuilder\<Aspire\.Hosting\.ApplicationModel\.ProjectResource\>, Aspire\.Hosting\.ApplicationModel\.IResourceBuilder\<Aspire\.Hosting\.ApplicationModel\.ProjectResource\>, string, string, string, int, string, string, string\)')
with `adminServer: null` \(and `adminUI: null`\) — the helper then wires the gateway sidecar and
shared state\-store / pub/sub components and adds no `eventstore-admin` / `eventstore-admin-ui`
resources\. Unlike [AddHexalithEventStorePlatformProjects\(this IDistributedApplicationBuilder, string, string, string\)](Hexalith.EventStore.Aspire.HexalithEventStorePlatformExtensions.md#Hexalith.EventStore.Aspire.HexalithEventStorePlatformExtensions.AddHexalithEventStorePlatformProjects(thisAspire.Hosting.IDistributedApplicationBuilder,string,string,string) 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Aspire\.HexalithEventStorePlatformExtensions\.AddHexalithEventStorePlatformProjects\(this Aspire\.Hosting\.IDistributedApplicationBuilder, string, string, string\)'), this never adds the admin projects\.

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Aspire.HexalithEventStorePlatformExtensions.AddHexalithEventStorePlatformProjects(thisAspire.Hosting.IDistributedApplicationBuilder,string,string,string)'></a>

## HexalithEventStorePlatformExtensions\.AddHexalithEventStorePlatformProjects\(this IDistributedApplicationBuilder, string, string, string\) Method

Adds the three Hexalith\.EventStore platform projects \(command gateway, Admin\.Server\.Host and Admin\.UI\)
to the distributed application, resolving each project file cross\-repo from the consuming repository's
`Hexalith.EventStore` submodule\.

```csharp
public static Hexalith.EventStore.Aspire.HexalithEventStorePlatformProjects AddHexalithEventStorePlatformProjects(this Aspire.Hosting.IDistributedApplicationBuilder builder, string eventStoreName="eventstore", string adminServerName="eventstore-admin", string adminUiName="eventstore-admin-ui");
```
#### Parameters

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Aspire.HexalithEventStorePlatformExtensions.AddHexalithEventStorePlatformProjects(thisAspire.Hosting.IDistributedApplicationBuilder,string,string,string).builder'></a>

`builder` [Aspire\.Hosting\.IDistributedApplicationBuilder](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/aspire.hosting.idistributedapplicationbuilder 'Aspire\.Hosting\.IDistributedApplicationBuilder')

The distributed application builder\.

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Aspire.HexalithEventStorePlatformExtensions.AddHexalithEventStorePlatformProjects(thisAspire.Hosting.IDistributedApplicationBuilder,string,string,string).eventStoreName'></a>

`eventStoreName` [System\.String](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.string 'System\.String')

The Aspire resource name for the EventStore command gateway\. Defaults to `"eventstore"`\.

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Aspire.HexalithEventStorePlatformExtensions.AddHexalithEventStorePlatformProjects(thisAspire.Hosting.IDistributedApplicationBuilder,string,string,string).adminServerName'></a>

`adminServerName` [System\.String](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.string 'System\.String')

The Aspire resource name for the Admin\.Server\.Host\. Defaults to `"eventstore-admin"`\.

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Aspire.HexalithEventStorePlatformExtensions.AddHexalithEventStorePlatformProjects(thisAspire.Hosting.IDistributedApplicationBuilder,string,string,string).adminUiName'></a>

`adminUiName` [System\.String](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.string 'System\.String')

The Aspire resource name for the Admin\.UI\. Defaults to `"eventstore-admin-ui"`\.

#### Returns
[HexalithEventStorePlatformProjects](Hexalith.EventStore.Aspire.HexalithEventStorePlatformProjects.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Aspire\.HexalithEventStorePlatformProjects')
A [HexalithEventStorePlatformProjects](Hexalith.EventStore.Aspire.HexalithEventStorePlatformProjects.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Aspire\.HexalithEventStorePlatformProjects') exposing the three project resource builders for
further customization and for wiring the topology with `AddHexalithEventStore`\.
